name: Cornish Hens with Toasted Rice Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 1 package UNCLE BEN'S Long Grain & Wild Rice Original Recipe
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan.
2. Add rice only and pecans, sauté over low heat, stirring occasionally, until rice turns golden brown.
3. Add seasoning packet, orange juice, water, raisins to the rice mixture and stir well.
4. Bring to a boil, cover, and reduce heat.
5. Simmer for 25 minutes or until liquid is absorbed. Remove from heat and let cool.
6. Remove seasoning packet from cavity of hens and discard.
7. Wash hens inside and out and drain well.
8. Season with salt and black pepper.
9. Fill the cavity of each hen with 1/2 to 3/4 cup rice mixture.
10. Cover and keep the remaining rice mixture warm for serving with hens.
11. Tie drumsticks together with string and place on a rack in a roasting pan.
12. Brush each hen with melted butter.
13. Roast in a 350°F oven for 1 hour or until juices run clear when hen is pierced.
14. Baste occasionally with melted butter while roasting.
15. Remove from oven.
16. Remove and discard the string.
17. Serve hens on a bed of remaining rice mixture.
